---
title: "A minha playlist!"
format: 
  dashboard:
    theme: cosmo
    orientation: columns
    logo: "data/img/logo.png"
---

```{ojs}
//| output: false

html`<link rel="stylesheet" href="assets/CSS.css">`
```

```{ojs}
//| output: false
data = FileAttachment("data/audio-data.json").json()
```

## Column {width="35%"}

### Row {height="100%"}

::: {.card}
**Lista de Músicas**

```{ojs}
// Tabela Interativa (Lista de Músicas)
viewof selection = {
  const container = html`<div class="playlist-container"></div>`;
  
  container.value = data[0];

  for (const song of data) {
    const row = html`
      <div style="
        display: flex; 
        align-items: center; 
        padding: 10px; 
        background: #0f2747; 
        border-radius: 8px; 
        cursor: pointer; 
        color: #eef4ff; 
        transition: background 0.2s, transform 0.1s;">
        
        <img src="${song.img}" style="width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 4px; margin-right: 15px; object-fit: cover;">
        
        <div>
          <div style="font-weight: bold; font-size: 1.1em;">${song.Música}</div>
          <div style="opacity: 0.7; font-size: 0.9em;">${song.Artista}</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `;

    row.onclick = () => {
      for (const child of container.children) child.style.background = "#0f2747";
      row.style.background = "#1a3664"; // Azul selecionado
      container.value = song;
      container.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", {bubbles: true}));
    };

    container.append(row);
  }

  if (container.children[0]) container.children[0].style.background = "#1a3664";

  // Garante que o valor inicial é emitido, evitando undefined no player
  container.dispatchEvent(new Event("input", {bubbles: true}));

  return container;
}
```
:::

## Column {width="65%"}

### Row {height="52%"}

::: {.card}
**Player**

```{ojs}
//| output: false
current = selection ?? data?.[0] ?? {}
playlistId = current?.id ?? ""
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
playlistId
  ? html`<iframe 
      style="border-radius:12px" 
      src=${`https://open.spotify.com/embed/track/${playlistId}?utm_source=generator`} 
      width="100%" 
      height="100%" 
      frameBorder="0" 
      allow="autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; fullscreen; picture-in-picture" 
      loading="lazy">
    </iframe>`
  : html`<div style="height:100%; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; color:#b3b3b3;">Seleciona uma faixa para carregar o player</div>`

millisToMinutesAndSeconds = (millis) => {
  if (!millis) return "-";
  const minutes = Math.floor(millis / 60000);
  const seconds = ((millis % 60000) / 1000).toFixed(0);
  return minutes + ":" + (seconds < 10 ? '0' : '') + seconds;
}

createTag = (label, value, icon = "") => {
  return html`
    <div style="
      background: #0f2747; 
      padding: 6px 8px; 
      border-radius: 6px; 
      border: 1px solid var(--border); 
      display: flex; 
      flex-direction: column; 
      justify-content: center;">
      
      <div style="font-size: 0.7rem; color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 3px; text-transform: uppercase;">${label}</div>
      <div style="font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text-primary);">
        ${icon} ${value || "-"}
      </div>
    </div>
  `
}
```
:::

### Row {height="48%"}

::: {.card style="padding-top: 5px;"}
**Detalhes da Faixa**

```{ojs}
html`
<div style="margin-top: 5px; margin-bottom: 10px;">
  <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr); gap: 8px;">
    ${createTag("Artista", current.Artista, "")}
    ${createTag("Álbum", current.Album || "Single", "")}
    ${createTag("Duração", millisToMinutesAndSeconds(current.Duracao),"")}
    ${createTag("Ano", current.Year || "N/A", "")}
    ${createTag("BPM", current.BPM, "")}
    ${createTag("Popularidade", (current.Popularidade || 0) + "%", "")}
    ${createTag("Energia", ((current.Energia || 0) * 100).toFixed(0) + "%", "")}
  </div>
  
  <div style="
    margin-top: 20px; 
    padding: 15px; 
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1f3f 0%, #18356a 100%); 
    border-left: 4px solid var(--accent); 
    border-radius: 8px;">
    <div style="font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 6px; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 1px;">Fun Fact</div>
    <div style="font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--text-primary); line-height: 1.5;">
      ${current.funfact || "Esta música é incrível!"}
    </div>
  </div>
</div>
`
```
:::
